name: Standard Box
subtitle: Package Cube
description: Modular box body for last-mile delivery and service upfits. Configurable doors and interior shelving with universal attachment points.

name: Climate Conditioned
subtitle: Reefer
description: Insulated box body with refrigeration for perishable grocery and food delivery. Single-zone or dual-zone temperature control.

name: Kiosk
subtitle: Mobile Retail
description: Mobile retail and service point with fold-out serving window. Configurable for café, merchandise display, or mobile service.

name: Flat Bed
subtitle: Open Platform
description: Open bed platform for municipal, utility, and campus operations. Available as stake body, dump, pickup, refuse, or service body.
